name: nuvio-stream-api
description: Secure reverse-proxy gatekeeper for Nuvio/Stremio streaming via Torrentio

scripts.deploy: node -e "fetch('https://api.vercel.com/v1/integrations/deploy/prj_d5NhkFhdykack6tRUyAKi9dcGZEA/QgplBJ8JXD', { method: 'POST' }).then(r => r.json().then(b => ({ status: r.status, body: b }))).then(r => { if (r.status >= 400) { console.error('Deploy FAILED:', r.status, JSON.stringify(r.body)); process.exit(1); } else { console.log('Deployment triggered:', JSON.stringify(r.body)); } }).catch(e => { console.error('Deploy error:', e.message); process.exit(1); })"
